series_metadata.series_title: Memoranda regarding PAT average wholesale prices
series_metadata.series_description: Memoranda (O.R.C. 5736.02(C)) identifying the statewide average wholesale prices of a gallon of unleaded regular gasoline, of a gallon of propane, and of a gallon of diesel fuel for each calendar quarter and any spreadsheets, data, and/or calculations identifying the prices.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: no longer of administrative value. If scanned, . ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value
